title: Capital vs Revenue Expenditures
event: Reyes Co. spends money on a machine already in service. Prepare the entry.

options.label: Betterment: $25,000 upgrade extending life and capacity

lines.label: ordinary upkeep
lines.why: Ordinary repairs maintain NORMAL operating condition — expense in the period incurred.
lines.trap: Capitalizing routine maintenance inflates assets and income — a classic manipulation exam questions probe.

lines.label: paid
lines.trap: The credit is the easy half — the classification battle is all on the debit.

lines.label: future benefit added
lines.why: Betterments extend life or capacity — the cost joins the asset and depreciates over remaining life.
lines.trap: Expensing a betterment crushes current income and understates the asset — mirror image of the repair error.

lines.label: paid
lines.trap: Future depreciation must be recomputed on the new, larger book value.

memorize.body: The test: does it EXTEND life or capability (capitalize) or just MAINTAIN it (expense)?
Materiality gives cover for small items — companies expense minor tools regardless. The principle bends for immaterial amounts.

questions.prompt: A $25,000 upgrade extends a machine's life by 3 years. Amount expensed IMMEDIATELY = ?

distractors.feedback: Life-extending expenditures are CAPITALIZED — the cost reaches income gradually through future depreciation.

build.scaffold: One question decides the debit: maintain (expense) or improve (capitalize)?
